title: HJC C17 Carbon Fiber Helmet

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with EPS Liner

technical_analysis: The HJC C17 utilizes a proprietary carbon fiber composite construction that significantly reduces overall mass without compromising structural integrity. The shell features a multi-density EPS liner designed to absorb impact energy across varying force vectors, meeting the rigorous standards of both DOT and ECE 22.06 certifications. Internal comfort is enhanced by a moisture-wicking, removable washable liner system that maintains hygiene while providing a custom fit through adjustable cheek pads.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of lightweight protection with the HJC C17, engineered for riders who demand uncompromising performance on the track and street. Crafted from premium carbon fiber, this helmet offers an exceptional strength-to-weight ratio, reducing neck fatigue during long rides while delivering top-tier safety ratings.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the HJC C17 Carbon Fiber Full Face Helmet. Lightweight, DOT & ECE certified, featuring superior ventilation and a sleek aerodynamic design for ultimate riding performance.
